text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've arrived at the final race of the Tiara tour,
the Shuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The media is abuzz with talk of Narita Brian and
the upcoming Triple Crown finale. Hishi Amazon
is reminded once more of her rival's power, and
gets fired up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she sets off to race, she discovers a letter and
a gift from her dorm residents, whose support
boosts her motivation even more.
